title: HallowenStyleIcons
description: This collection of Halloween- style icons was specially created for minecraft resource packs
body:
This new collection of Halloween-style icons was born to breathe life into pixelated worlds with a mysterious and enchanted vibe. Frozen creatures, haunted candies, and eerie figures like the icebound vampire and the abyss watcher come together to turn your resource pack into a magical and chilling experience.

![HUD element](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1f03306fe1d39052a1efd93f6f8b7368501e4aef.png)
